zh.Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium: 比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文
zh.lifeSummary: 當Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen於1142年出生在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文時，他的父親Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen38歲，母親Luitgard von Sulzbach33歲。他於1155年之前與Margaretha van Limburg在比利時布拉班特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1190年8月21日在比利時布拉班特 瓦隆奧迪尼尼-盧瓦-拉-福享年48歲，埋葬在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen于1142年出生在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文时，他的父亲Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen38岁，母亲Luitgard von Sulzbach33岁。他于1155年之前与Margaretha van Limburg在比利时布拉班特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1190年8月21日在比利时布拉班特 瓦隆奧迪尼尼-盧瓦-拉-福享年48岁，埋葬在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen was born in 1142, in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium, his father, Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, was 38 and his mother, Luitgard von Sulzbach, was 33. He married Margaretha van Limburg before 1155, in Brabant, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 21 August 1190, in Ottignies-Louvain-la-Neuve, Walloon Brabant, Belgium, at the age of 48, and was buried in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen est né en 1142, à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique, son père, Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Luitgard von Sulzbach, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Margaretha van Limburg avant 1155, à Brabant, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 21 août 1190, à Ottignies-Louvain-la-Neuve, Brabant wallon, Belgique, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen 1142 in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen 38 und seine Mutter Luitgard von Sulzbach 33. Er hat vor 1155 in Brabant, Belgien Margaretha van Limburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 21. August 1190 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Ottignies-Louvain-la-Neuve, Wallonisch Brabant, Belgien und wurde in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen è nato il nel 1142 nel Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio, il suo padre, Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Luitgard von Sulzbach, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Margaretha van Limburg prima del 1155, nel Brabante, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 21 agosto 1190, nel Ottignies-Louvain-la-Neuve, Brabant wallon, Belgio, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio.

ja.Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium: ベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベン
ja.lifeSummary: Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingenが1142年にベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンで生まれた時，父Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingenは38歳，母Luitgard von Sulzbachは33歳であった。1155年以前にベルギーブラバントでMargaretha van Limburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1190年8月21日にベルギーブラバント ワロンオッティグニース-ロウベイン-ラ-ネウブで48歳で死去し，ベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen(이)가 1142년 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Luitgard von Sulzbach(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1155년 이전 벨기에 브라반트에서 Margaretha van Limburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1190년 8월 21일 벨기에 브라반트 월런 오티그니스-루바인-라-니우브에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen nasceu em 1142, em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, seu pai, Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Luitgard von Sulzbach, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaretha van Limburg antes 1155, em Brabante, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 21 de agosto de 1190, em Ottignies-Louvain-la-Neuve, Brabant wallon, Bélgica, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen родился в 1142 г. в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Luitgard von Sulzbach, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaretha van Limburg перед 1155 г. в местности брабант, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 21 августа 1190 г. в местности оттигниес-лоувеин-ла-неув, брабант валлон, Бельгия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen nació en 1142, en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, su papá, Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Luitgard von Sulzbach, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Margaretha van Limburg antes de 1155, en Brabante, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 21 de agosto de 1190, en Ottignies-Louvain-la-Neuve, Brabant wallon, Bélgica, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica.
